text:
単に優秀なソード使いなら
これまで掃いて捨てるほどいた。

だが教導官たる私の地位を脅かしそうな
腕を持つ者が現れた試しはない。

ドラゴン・エクスを仕留めることで
私を脅かしてくれたま

Nothing special about just being a skilled Sword
wielder. I've seen plenty of 'em come and go.

But finding someone good enough to intimidate
me? The Instructor? That'll be the day.

Want to really make me quake in my boots? Then
get going on this Dragon X hunt.
